queries.sql: SELECT COUNT_BIG(1) AS reference_value FROM dbo.vw_RandevuRaporu;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT HastaId) AS reference_value FROM dbo.vw_RandevuRaporu WHERE HastaId IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SubeAdi, COUNT_BIG(1) AS reference_value FROM dbo.vw_RandevuRaporu GROUP BY SubeAdi;
SELECT AVG(CONVERT(float, RandevuSuresi)) AS reference_value FROM dbo.vw_RandevuRaporu WHERE RandevuSuresi IS NOT NULL;

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN BaslangicTarihi >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) AND BaslangicTarihi < DATEADD(month, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS current_period_count, SUM(CASE WHEN BaslangicTarihi >= DATEADD(month, -1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1)) AND BaslangicTarihi < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS baseline_period_count FROM dbo.vw_RandevuRaporu;
